{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_0148W6FC5w9N7jXUSS6epJqt","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01MtzgxS8EJoUZVyXz6MxvfX","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 - <<'PY'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np, glob\npd.set_option('display.width',220,'display.max_columns',60)\n\n# ---- business-hours elapsed between two arrays of timestamps ----\nWORK_START, WORK_END = 9, 17\nSECS_PER_DAY = (WORK_END-WORK_START)*3600\nEPOCH = np.datetime64('2024-01-01')  # a Monday\n\ndef work_clock(ts):\n    \"\"\"work seconds elapsed from EPOCH to ts (vectorized).\"\"\"\n    ts = pd.to_datetime(ts)\n    dates = ts.values.astype('datetime64[D]')\n    # full weekdays strictly before this date since EPOCH\n    fulldays = np.busday_count(EPOCH, dates)  # counts weekdays in [EPOCH, date)\n    base = fulldays.astype('float64')*SECS_PER_DAY\n    # within-day seconds\n    secs = (ts.dt.hour*3600 + ts.dt.minute*60 + ts.dt.second).values.astype('float64')\n    lo, hi = WORK_START*3600, WORK_END*3600\n    within = np.clip(secs, lo, hi) - lo\n    # if the day itself is a weekend, within-day work = 0\n    is_weekday = np.is_busday(dates)\n    within = np.where(is_weekday, within, 0.0)\n    return base + within\n\ndef biz_seconds(start, end):\n    return work_clock(end) - work_clock(start)\n\n# sanity test\ntest = pd.to_datetime(pd.Series(['2024-01-08T16:50:00','2024-01-09T09:27:00']))\nprint(\"test biz hours (16:50 Mon -> 09:27 Tue):\", biz_seconds(test[:1], test[1:2]).values/3600, \"expect ~0.62\")\n\nta = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('task_assignment_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\nta['biz_h'] = biz_seconds(pd.to_datetime(ta.assigned_at), pd.to_datetime(ta.unassigned_at))/3600\nprint(\"\\nAssignment biz-hours by role (median / p90 / mean):\")\ng = ta.groupby('assignment_role')['biz_h'].agg(['count','median',lambda x:x.quantile(.9),'mean']).round(2)\ng.columns=['count','median','p90','mean']\nprint(g.sort_values('median'))\nprint(\"\\nnegative durations:\", (ta.biz_h<0).sum(), \" zero:\", (ta.biz_h==0).sum())\nPY","description":"Business-hours engine + assignment durations"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2961,"cache_read_input_tokens":29192,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2961,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":41,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"d0d18e7c-90ab-4da4-aad1-a9d370534bc7","uuid":"f07536ab-2cc0-425c-8962-c11c0923b0a9","request_id":"req_011Cbf9ZMmNV327B3MsC2kY2"}

lo\n    within = np.where(np.is_busday(dates), within, 0.0)\n    return base + within\n\ndef biz_hours(start, end):\n    return (work_clock(end) - work_clock(start))/3600.0\nPY\npython3 - <<'PY'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np, glob\nfrom _bizlib import biz_hours\ntest = pd.Series(pd.to_datetime(['2024-01-08T16:50:00','2024-01-09T09:27:00']))\nprint(\"test (Mon16:50->Tue09:27):\", round(biz_hours(test[:1],test[1:2])[0],3), \"expect ~0.62\")\ntest2 = pd.Series(pd.to_datetime(['2024-01-05T16:00:00','2024-01-08T10:00:00']))  # Fri16->Mon10\nprint(\"test (Fri16->Mon10):\", round(biz_hours(test2[:1],test2[1:2])[0],3), \"expect ~2.0\")\n\nta = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('task_assignment_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\nta['biz_h'] = biz_hours(ta.assigned_at, ta.unassigned_at)\ng = ta.groupby('assignment_role')['biz_h'].agg(count='count',median='median',\n        p90=lambda x:x.quantile(.9),mean='mean').round(2)\nprint(\"\\nAssignment biz-hours by role:\\n\", g.sort_values('median'))\nprint(\"\\nneg:\",(ta.biz_h<0).sum(),\" zero:\",(ta.biz_h==0).sum(), \" max:\",ta.biz_h.max().round(1))\nPY","description":"Fixed bizhours + assignment durations"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":131,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3107,"cache_read_input_tokens":32153,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3107,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":52,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"d0d18e7c-90ab-4da4-aad1-a9d370534bc7","uuid":"44acab46-af26-45a1-a1f7-1a5ad050bd71","request_id":"req_011Cbf9cUS3oyLhtpFrQuLrB"}

>> /app/analyze.py <<'PY'\n\nprint(\"\\n\\n############ OVERLOAD ANALYSIS ############\")\n# --- concurrency: max simultaneously-open assignments per employee ---\nta2 = ta.dropna(subset=['assigned_at','unassigned_at']).copy()\nta2['s']=pd.to_datetime(ta2.assigned_at); ta2['e']=pd.to_datetime(ta2.unassigned_at)\ndef max_concurrency(df):\n    ev=[]\n    for s,e in zip(df.s,df.e):\n        ev.append((s,1)); ev.append((e,-1))\n    ev.sort()\n    cur=mx=0\n    for _,d in ev:\n        cur+=d; mx=max(mx,cur)\n    return mx\nconc = ta2.groupby('employee_id').apply(max_concurrency, include_groups=False).rename('max_concurrent')\n\n# --- volume metrics ---\nvol = ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(n_assign=('task_id','size'),\n        busy_h=('biz_h','sum')).reset_index()\n\n# meetings\nmp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('meeting_participant_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\nmtg = mp.groupby('employee_id').size().rename('n_meetings')\n\n# messages\nmsg = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('message_metadata_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\nmsg_s = msg.groupby('sender_id').size().rename('msg_sent')\nmsg_r = msg.groupby('receiver_id').size().rename('msg_recv')\n\nov = emp[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','department']].copy()\nfor s in [conc, mtg, msg_s, msg_r]:\n    ov = ov.merge(s, left_on='employee_id', right_index=True, how='left')\nov = ov.merge(vol, on='employee_id', how='left').fillna(0)\nov = ['max_concurrent','n_meetings','msg_sent','msg_recv','n_assign','busy_h']:\n    ov['z_'+c]=z_within(ov,c)\nov['overload_z']=ov[['z_max_concurrent','z_n_meetings','z_msg_sent','z_msg_recv','z_n_assign','z_busy_h']].mean(axis=1)\n\nprint(\"\\nTop 20 by composite overload z (within ['employee_id','role','seniority_level','max_concurrent','n_meetings','msg_sent','msg_recv','n_assign','busy_h','overload_z','slow_lr']].round(2).to_string(index=False))\n\nprint(\"\\nTop 15 by {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01AUVndJiKCKQPsSrq17GasQ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01BKQYJgzubibCJoZA8JamGY","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /app/pipeline.py <<'PY'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np, glob\nfrom _bizlib import biz_hours\npd.set_option('display.width',240,'display.max_columns',60)\nemp = pd.read_csv('employee_001.csv')\ntask = pd.read_csv('task_001.csv', parse_dates=['created_at','completed_at'])\nta = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('task_assignment_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\nta['s']=pd.to_datetime(ta.assigned_at); ta['e']=pd.to_datetime(ta.unassigned_at)\nta['hold']=biz_hours(ta.assigned_at, ta.unassigned_at)\n\n# ---- WAIT TIME: per task, gap between consecutive stages, attributed to the picker-upper ----\nta=ta.sort_values(['task_id','s'])\nta['prev_end']=ta.groupby('task_id')['e'].shift(1)\nta['wait']=np.where(ta.prev_end.notna(), biz_hours(ta.prev_end, ta.s), 0.0)\nta['wait']=ta['wait'].clip(lower=0)\n\n# normalize hold by role+complexity, wait by role\nta=ta.merge(task[['task_id','complexity_score']],on='task_id',how='left')\nta['hold_exp']=ta.groupby(['assignment_role','complexity_score'])['hold'].transform('median')\nta['wait_exp']=ta.groupby(['assignment_role'])['wait'].transform('median')\nta['hold_excess']=ta['hold']-ta['hold_exp']\nta['wait_excess']=ta['wait']-ta['wait_exp']\n\nagg=ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(n=('task_id','size'),\n      hold_excess=('hold_excess','mean'), wait_excess=('wait_excess','mean'),\n      wait_med=('wait','median')).reset_index()\nagg=agg.merge(emp[['employee_id','role','seniority_level']],on='employee_id',how='left')\nprint(\"=== Mean WAIT-excess they impose (do tasks queue before this person picks up?) ===\")\nprint(\"global median wait between stages: %.2f h\"%ta.wait.median())\nprint(agg.sort_values('wait_excess',ascending=False).head(15)[\n   ['employee_id','role','seniority_level','n','wait_excess','hold_excess']].round(2).to_string(index=False))\n\n# ---- TASK-LEVEL: most delayed tasks, employee over-representation ----\ntask['dur']=biz_hours(task.created_at, task.completed_at)\ntask['dur_exp']=task.groupby(['task_type','complexity_score'])['dur'].transform('median')\ntask['delay_ratio']=task['dur']/task['dur_exp'].clip(lower=.1)\nthr=task['delay_ratio'].quantile(.85)\ndelayed=set(task.loc[task.delay_ratio>=thr,'task_id'])\nprint(f\"\\n=== Over-representation in most-delayed tasks (top 15%%, n={len(delayed)}) ===\")\nta['is_delayed']=ta.task_id.isin(delayed)\nemp_rate=ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(n=('task_id','size'),\n _bizlib import biz_hours\npd.set_option('display.width',240,'display.max_columns',60)\nemp = pd.read_csv('employee_001.csv')\ntask = pd.read_csv('task_001.csv', parse_dates=['created_at','completed_at'])\nta = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('task_assignment_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\nta['s']=pd.to_datetime(ta.assigned_at); ta['e']=pd.to_datetime(ta.unassigned_at)\nta['hold']=biz_hours(ta.assigned_at, ta.unassigned_at)\n\n# ---- WAIT TIME: per task, gap between consecutive stages, attributed to the picker-upper ----\nta=ta.sort_values(['task_id','s'])\nta['prev_end']=ta.groupby('task_id')['e'].shift(1)\nta['wait']=np.where(ta.prev_end.notna(), biz_hours(ta.prev_end, ta.s), 0.0)\nta['wait']=ta['wait'].clip(lower=0)\n\n# normalize hold by role+complexity, wait by role\nta=ta.merge(task[['task_id','complexity_score']],on='task_id',how='left')\nta['hold_exp']=ta.groupby(['assignment_role','complexity_score'])['hold'].transform('median')\nta['wait_exp']=ta.groupby(['assignment_role'])['wait'].transform('median')\nta['hold_excess']=ta['hold']-ta['hold_exp']\nta['wait_excess']=ta['wait']-ta['wait_exp']\n\nagg=ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(n=('task_id','size'),\n      hold_excess=('hold_excess','mean'), wait_excess=('wait_excess','mean'),\n      wait_med=('wait','median')).reset_index()\nagg=agg.merge(emp[['employee_id','role','seniority_level']],on='employee_id',how='left')\nprint(\"=== Mean WAIT-excess they impose (do tasks queue before this person picks up?) ===\")\nprint(\"global median wait between stages: %.2f h\"%ta.wait.median())\nprint(agg.sort_values('wait_excess',ascending=False).head(15)[\n   ['employee_id','role','seniority_level','n','wait_excess','hold_excess']].round(2).to_string(index=False))\n\n# ---- TASK-LEVEL: most delayed tasks, employee over-representation ----\ntask['dur']=biz_hours(task.created_at, task.completed_at)\ntask['dur_exp']=task.groupby(['task_type','complexity_score'])['dur'].transform('median')\ntask['delay_ratio']=task['dur']/task['dur_exp'].clip(lower=.1)\nthr=task['delay_ratio'].quantile(.85)\ndelayed=set(task.loc[task.delay_ratio>=thr,'task_id'])\nprint(f\"\\n=== Over-representation in most-delayed tasks (top 15%%, n={len(delayed)}) ===\")\nta['is_delayed']=ta.task_id.isin(delayed)\nemp_rate=ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(n=('task_id','size'),\n        in_delayed=('is_delayed','sum')).reset_index()\nemp_rate['rate']=emp_rate.in_delayed/emp_rate.n\nbase=ta.is_delayed.mean()\nemp_rate=emp_rate[emp_rate.n>=8].merge(emp[['employee_id','role','seniority_level']],on='employee_id')\nprint(\"base rate=%.3f. Top 15 by delayed-task involvement rate (n>=8):\"%base)\nprint(emp_rate.sort_values('rate',ascending=False).head(15)[\n   ['employee_id','role','seniority_level','n','in_delayed','rate']].round(3).to_string(index=False))\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":10,"oldLines":7,"newStart":10,"newLines":9,"lines":[" # ---- WAIT TIME: per task, gap between consecutive stages, attributed to the picker-upper ----"," ta=ta.sort_values(['task_id','s'])"," ta['prev_end']=ta.groupby('task_id')['e'].shift(1)","-ta['wait']=np.where(ta.prev_end.notna(), biz_hours(ta.prev_end, ta.s), 0.0)","+has_prev=ta.prev_end.notna()","+pe=ta.prev_end.where(has_prev, ta.s)  # avoid NaT; wait set to 0 there","+ta['wait']=np.where(has_prev, biz_hours(pe, ta.s), 0.0)"," ta['wait']=ta['wait'].clip(lower=0)"," "," # normalize hold by role+complexity, wait by role"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_0152hJzLVm24YDas4viqcPdF","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01DkcFuQ1bpeZ4Davh1Vogqz","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /app/consolidate.py <<'PY'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np, glob\nfrom _bizlib import biz_hours\nfrom sklearn.linear_model import Ridge\npd.set_option('display.width',260,'display.max_columns',80)\nemp = pd.read_csv('employee_001.csv')\ntask = pd.read_csv('task_001.csv', parse_dates=['created_at','completed_at'])\nta = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('task_assignment_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\nta['hold']=biz_hours(ta.assigned_at, ta.unassigned_at)\nta['s']=pd.to_datetime(ta.assigned_at)\n\n# regression delay coef, robustness across alphas\ntask['dur']=biz_hours(task.created_at, task.completed_at); task=task[task.dur>0].copy()\ny=np.log(task.dur.values)\nfeat=pd.get_dummies(task[['task_type','priority']],drop_first=True).astype(float)\nfeat['complexity']=task.complexity_score.values; feat['risk']=task.risk_score.values\nnass=ta.groupby('task_id').size(); feat['n_assign']=task.task_id.map(nass).fillna(0).values\nemps=sorted(ta.employee_id.unique()); ecol={e:j for j,e in enumerate(emps)}\nidx={t:i for i,t in enumerate(task.task_id.values)}\nP=np.zeros((len(task),len(emps)))\nfor t,e in zip(ta.task_id,ta.employee_id):\n    if t in idx: P[idx[t],ecol[e]]=1.0\nPdf=pd.DataFrame(P,columns=[f'e{e}' for e in emps])\nX=pd.concat([feat.reset_index(drop=True),Pdf],axis=1).values.astype(float)\ncoefs={}\nfor a in [2.0,5.0,10.0,20.0]:\n    c=Ridge(alpha=a).fit(X,y).coef_[-len(emps):]\n    coefs[f'coef_a{int(a)}']=pd.Series(c,index=emps)\nR=pd.DataFrame(coefs); R.index.name='employee_id'; R=R.reset_index()\n\n# holding slowness\nta2=ta.merge(task[['task_id','complexity_score']],on='task_id',how='left')\nta2['hexp']=ta2.groupby(['assignment_role','complexity_score'])['hold'].transform('median')\nta2['lr']=np.log((ta2.hold+.05)/(ta2.hexp+.05))\nslow=ta2.groupby('employee_id')['lr'].mean().rename('slow_lr')\n\n# wait excess\nta2=ta2.sort_values(['task_id','s']); ta2['pe']=ta2.groupby('task_id')['s'].shift(0)\nta2['prev_end']=ta2.groupby('task_id').apply(lambda d:d['s'], include_groups=False).values if False else None\ntmp=ta.sort_values(['task_id','s']).copy(); tmp['e']=pd.to_datetime(tmp.unassigned_at)\ntmp['prev_end']=tmp.groupby('task_id')['e'].shift(1); hp=tmp.prev_end.notna()\npe=tmp.prev_end.where(hp,tmp.s); tmp['wait']=np.where(hp,biz_hours(pe,tmp.s),0.0); tmp['wait']=tmp.wait.clip(lower=0)\ntmp['wexp']=tmp.groupby('assignment_role')['wait'].transform('median')\nwaitx=(tmp.assign(we=tmp.wait-tmp.wexp).groupby('employee_id')['we'].mean()).rename('wait_excess')\n\n# overload: concurrency, volume, meetings, msgs (z within seniority)\nmp=pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('meeting_participant_*.csv'))],ignore_index=True)\nmsg=pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('message_metadata_*.csv'))],ignore_index=True)\nvol=ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(n_assign=('task_id','size'),busy_h=('hold','sum'))\nvol['n_meet']=mp.groupby('employee_id').size().reindex(vol.index).fillna(0)\nvol['msg']=(msg.groupby('sender_id').size().reindex(vol.index).fillna(0)+msg.groupby('receiver_id').size().reindex(vol.index).fillna(0))\nvol=vol.reset_index().merge(emp[['employee_id','seniority_level']],on='employee_id')\nfor c in ['n_assign','busy_h','n_meet','msg']:\n    g=vol.groupby('seniority_level')[c]; vol['z_'+c]=(vol[c]-g.transform('median'))/(g.transform('std')+1e-9)\nvol['overload_z']=vol[['z_n_assign','z_busy_h','z_n_meet','z_msg']].mean(axis=1)\n\nM=R.merge(emp[['employee_id','role','seniority_level']],on='employee_id')\nM=M.merge(slow,on='employee_id').merge(waitx,on='employee_id').merge(vol[['employee_id','overload_z','n_assign']],on='employee_id')\nM=M.sort_values('coef_a5',ascending=False)\nprint(\"TOP 18 consolidated (coef across alphas should be stable):\")\nprint(M.head(18)[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','n_assign','coef_a2','coef_a5','coef_a10','coef_a20','slow_lr','wait_excess','overload_z']].round(3).to_string(index=False))\nM.to_csv('/app/_consolidated.csv',index=False)\nPY\npython3 /app/consolidate.py","description":"Consolidate all signals + regression robustness"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6249,"cache_read_input_tokens":54605,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":6249,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"d0d18e7c-90ab-4da4-aad1-a9d370534bc7","uuid":"1d4e030d-faec-48dd-8991-9034e816a3de","request_id":"req_011Cbf9y5aDKeC8V6CPhwdZm"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_019cJVeG9tbtWRzXrFZS7rET","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"I identified **12 bottleneck employees** and wrote them to `/app/answer.json`.\n\n## Approach\n\n**1. Business-hours latency engine.** I confirmed all pipeline work happens Mon–Fri 9:00–17:00 UTC, so I measured every duration in *business hours* (an approval requested at 16:50 and resolved 09:27 next day = 0.6h, not overnight). This is essential to avoid mistaking nights/weekends for delay.\n\n**2. The unifying symptom = delay.** Whether the root cause is *overload* or *poor performance*, the prompt says the result is the same: tasks they're assigned to get delayed. An assignment's `assigned_at → unassigned_at` holding time, plus the queue-wait before they pick a task up, captures both.\n\n**3. Gold-standard attribution (the decisive step).** Since ~5 employees touch each task, being *present* on a slow task ≠ *causing* it. I ran a **Ridge regression** of each task's log business-hours duration on its intrinsic features (complexity, risk, type, priority, #assignees) **plus a presence dummy for every employee**. Each employee's coefficient is their *marginal* delay contribution, controlling for everyone else. This revealed a clean group of 12 above a sharp gap (0.163 → 0.093 — the single largest gap in the whole ladder), stable across regularization strengths.\n\n**4. Mechanism confirmation.** Every one of the 12 has a corroborating root cause; none is unexplained:\n\n| Type | Employees | Evidence |\n|------|-----------|----------|\n| **Poor performance** | 281, 282, 123, 222 | 4–5× slower than role+complexity peers on *every* assignment; independently confirmed by code-review turnaround (281≈10h, 123≈9h, 282≈7h vs 1.4h median) and approval turnaround — all with sharp cliffs to the rest |\n| **Overload** | 26, 74, 45, 325, 204, 302, 81, 228 | Normal per-task speed, but top of the workload distribution (volume/concurrency/meetings/messages) with large excess queue-wait (tasks pile up waiting for them) |\n\n281 and 282 (managers) exhibit both mechanisms. The 8 overload-type bottlenecks would have been **missed** by a holding-time-only analysis — the regression is what surfaced them.\n\n**Final answer:** `[26, 45, 74, 81, 123, 204, 222, 228, 281, 282, 302, 325]`"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":182,"cache_read_input_tokens":70679,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":182,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"d0d18e7c-90ab-4da4-aad1-a9d370534bc7","uuid":"1947d741-f87a-4135-892d-f91da7c285b6","request_id":"req_011CbfA6sUfNrkgHrNCSPF7C"}
